metadata.reference: R. Beaini, B. Baloukas, S. Loquai, J.E. Klemberg-Sapieha, L. Martinu. Thermochromic VO2-based smart radiator devices with ultralow refractive index cavities for increased performance. Sol. Energy Mater. Sol. Cells 205, 110260 (2020) (Data points extracted from Fig. 1)
metadata.comments: 70 nm-thick VO<sub>2</sub> film deposited on SiO<sub>2</sub> substrate. 25 °C.
